positive: A minimalist, abstract depiction of a celestial fox spirit (kitsune), rendered in clean, bold silhouette style. The fox is shown in a dynamic, ethereal pose, surrounded by glowing, stylized magical elements like crescent moons, swirling nebula patterns, and geometric floral patterns. The color palette should be deep indigo, glowing turquoise, and ethereal gold, printed on a solid cream background. The composition must be centered, utilizing negative space effectively for high-impact visibility on apparel. Inspired by Art Nouveau and Japanese woodblock printing techniques. High contrast, line art focused, vector quality, perfect for screen printing.
